title: Python Codegen Completion

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.next_action: Migrate the root agentic-workspace Python console front door away from package-local cli.py while keeping hand-owned runtime primitives in a non-CLI module and preserving generated parser/dispatch proof.

stop_conditions.stop when: The work no longer matches the promoted item or its completion criteria.

execution_run.what happened: Recovered the active #892 plan from an obsolete #933 next action, migrated the root `agentic-workspace` Python console entrypoint to `agentic_workspace.generated_cli_entrypoint`, and moved hand-owned root runtime primitives from `src/agentic_workspace/cli.py` to `src/agentic_workspace/_runtime_cli.py`.
execution_run.scope touched: root workspace Python front-door and runtime ownership metadata; planning and memory package front doors remain for later slices
execution_run.changed surfaces: pyproject.toml; src/agentic_workspace/generated_cli_entrypoint.py; src/agentic_workspace/_runtime_cli.py; root runtime ownership contracts; generated TypeScript runtime metadata derived from command_package_ir; focused proof/tests; this execplan and state.toml
execution_run.validations run: uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-conformance; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py tests/test_workspace_packaging.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_start_preflight_cli.py tests/test_workspace_config_cli.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace scripts/check tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py tests/test_workspace_packaging.py tests/test_workspace_start_preflight_cli.py tests/test_workspace_config_cli.py; uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; uv run python -m agentic_workspace.generated_cli_entrypoint defaults --section startup --format json; uv run python -m agentic_workspace.generated_cli_entrypoint start --task "front door smoke" --select kind --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: root front-door slice is ready to commit; continue with planning then memory package front-door migrations as separate slices
execution_run.next step: Commit and push the root front-door slice, then continue with the next package front-door migration slice.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
